title: Broken CSS alignment on navigation menu
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. Open site homepage.
2. Shrink screen to mobile view (under 768px).
3. Observe menu layout.

Expected: The burger menu icon should align to the right.
Actual: The burger menu icon overflows to a new line.

Environment: Safari 17 on macOS Sonoma, mobile responsive view.
notes: Fully complete ticket. Contains steps, environment, and expected/actual details. Should score high immediately.
